elder_intro.speaker: Elder Thane
elder_intro.text: You feel it too, don't you? The mountain has been restless since the last storm.

elder_intro.speaker: Elder Thane
elder_intro.text: When I was your age, the lights above the peak meant festival season. Now nobody remembers what they meant before that.

elder_intro.speaker: Elder Thane
elder_intro.text: Go on, then. But take the path. The woods keep their own counsel these days.

kid_pond.speaker: Pell
kid_pond.text: I saw a fish made of light in the pond yesterday! Nobody believes me.
